name: skill-plan-lint
description: Local-first linter for reusable agent skill instructions.

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/cli.js && node --check tests/*.test.js
scripts.smoke: node src/cli.js --help && node src/cli.js check fixtures/good-skill.md > /tmp/skill-plan-lint-smoke.txt
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm test && npm run build && npm run smoke && npm run package:smoke

author: Roger Chappel
